focus: REPL — an exploratory 'watch me' task must NOT become a written .robot test
requires: a browser library (SeleniumLibrary or Browser) installed in the project — the only non-offline case; without it the agent should still pick the REPL, but can't actually open a browser
query: Open a visible browser, go to https://example.com, and tell me the page title — I want to watch it happen.
files: demo-project + a browser library installed (SeleniumLibrary or Browser, plus `rfbrowser init` for Browser)
expected_behavior: Starts a REPL (`robotcode repl`) and drives the task live — does NOT write a .robot test file
Opens the browser non-headless (e.g. `New Browser    headless=False`, or a visible `Open Browser`) so it can be watched, and keeps the session open
Reports the page title from the live session
Only offers to save it as a test afterwards, if asked
